payload.title: Lights in the Deep
paragraphs: Sunlight fades quickly underwater. Below about a thousand metres, the ocean becomes a world of permanent darkness, colder and emptier than almost anywhere on land. For a long time, scientists assumed that so little could survive there that the deep sea was hardly worth studying.

In fact, the darkness is full of light. A surprising number of deep-sea animals make their own glow, a trick known as bioluminescence. Some use it to lure prey toward their jaws; others flash to confuse a predator or to signal a mate. In a place where the sun never reaches, a living spark can mean the difference between eating and being eaten.

Studying these creatures is far from easy. Bright submarine lamps frighten the animals away, and the pressure at such depths would crush an ordinary camera. Researchers have therefore built quiet vehicles with dim red lights, which most deep-sea species cannot see. Watching patiently in near-darkness, they are slowly learning that the deep ocean, once dismissed as a desert, is one of the liveliest places on Earth.

questions.prompt: 本文の主旨として最も適切なものはどれですか。
options: The deep sea, once thought nearly lifeless, is full of animals that make their own light.
Sunlight reaches every part of the ocean, even far below the surface.
Deep-sea animals avoid light of any kind because it always harms them.
Scientists have decided the deep ocean is not worth exploring at all.

questions.before: Some deep-sea animals produce light in order to

questions.prompt: 深海の生物を観察することが難しい理由を示す語句はどれですか。

spans.text: the pressure at such depths would crush an ordinary camera
a living spark can mean the difference between eating and being eaten

questions.sentence: To them, it looked like a cold, dark desert with nothing worth a closer look.

questions.prompt: 研究者が深海の生物を観察する方法として本文に合うものはどれですか。
options: They use dim red light, which most deep-sea animals cannot see, to watch without scaring them.
They shine the brightest possible lamps to force the animals to appear.
They have given up using vehicles and now dive by hand instead.
They study the deep sea only from photographs taken at the surface.

readingQuestions.prompt: 本文を読んで各設問に答えてください。

payload.title: The Cafe Where Nothing Is Sold
paragraphs: In a community hall on the edge of town, a strange kind of cafe opens once a month. No one buys coffee or cake here. Instead, people arrive carrying broken toasters, torn jackets, and lamps that no longer light. They have come to a repair cafe, where volunteers help them fix the things they already own.

The idea is simple but powerful. Every year, households throw away mountains of items that could easily be mended. At the repair cafe, a retired electrician might bring a radio back to life, while a skilful sewer rescues a favourite coat. Visitors are encouraged to watch and learn, so that next time they can make the repair themselves.

The benefits reach beyond saving money and reducing waste. Strangers sit together at a workbench, sharing tools and stories, and a quiet street gains a new place to meet. For many who come, the mended object matters less than the feeling that their small skills are useful again.

questions.prompt: 本文が最も伝えたいことはどれですか。
options: Repair cafes help people fix their belongings while cutting waste and bringing the community together.
Repair cafes are ordinary shops that sell cheap coffee and cake.
People should always throw broken items away instead of mending them.
Only trained engineers are allowed to enter a repair cafe.

questions.before: At a repair cafe, volunteers help visitors
questions.after: their broken items instead of throwing them away.

questions.prompt: リペアカフェが環境に与える利点を示す語句はどれですか。

spans.text: carrying broken toasters, torn jackets, and lamps
a retired electrician might bring a radio back to life

questions.prompt: 第3段落が伝えている主な点はどれですか。
options: Besides cutting waste, the cafe gives people connection and a sense of being useful.
The cafe failed because no one wanted to repair anything.
Neighbours refuse to share their tools with one another.
The main purpose of the cafe is to make a large profit.
